name: halts-without-generating-tasks-stamp
baseline: A no-skill agent just reviews the plan and gives an opinion — no concept of the generating-tasks stamp gate, so it never checks REVIEW-LOG.md and never halts.
expected_behavior: Checks REVIEW-LOG.md for a generating-tasks stamp before dispatching the judge
Finds no generating-tasks stamp and HALTS immediately
Tells the developer to run /generating-tasks first and approve the tasks
Does NOT emit a verdict or write a Plan Review marker

name: structured-verdict-with-severities-and-grounding
query: Review PLAN-SHOP-88.md against ticket SHOP-88 (generating-tasks stamp APPROVED).
baseline: A no-skill agent writes a prose review with mixed observations and no per-finding severity, no single headline verdict, no Grounding-verified section, and judges inline (inheriting any producer-session bias) rather than dispatching a fresh-context subagent.
expected_behavior: Dispatches the rubric run as a fresh-context subagent (bias guardrail), not inline
Every finding carries a severity: BLOCKER, SHOULD-FIX, or NIT
Emits a single headline verdict: DO NOT PROCEED, PROCEED WITH CHANGES, or PROCEED
Includes a Grounding verified section listing files actually read
Verifies file/export references by reading them rather than assuming they exist

name: silent-breaking-change-is-a-blocker-despite-clean-look
pressure: social-proof + sunk-cost: the plan looks polished and self-assured, tempting a rubber-stamp PROCEED
query: Review PLAN-SHOP-88.md — it's a clean, confident plan that renames an exported function consumed by other modules but adds no migration step. Looks ready to me.
baseline: A no-skill agent, nudged by the plan's polish and the 'looks ready' framing, gives a PROCEED/approve without tracing consumers of the renamed export — it does not treat the silent breaking change as a blocker.
expected_behavior: Identifies the renamed exported symbol as a breaking change despite the plan's confident tone
Traces or names the affected consumers (blast-radius analysis), not just notes it looks risky
Flags it as BLOCKER and the headline verdict is DO NOT PROCEED
Does NOT edit the plan or write code — reports and proposes only
